synthesis.description: Controls synthesis behavior. mode: 'auto' (intelligent assessment based on note accumulation), 'manual' (explicit only), 'batch' (multiple then all at once), 'deterministic' (after every ingest). kb_template: 'default' (minimal) or 'comprehensive' (predefined topics)

ingest.description: Default crawler to use. 'auto' means automatic detection based on URL pattern

paths.description: All generated content (captures, feeds, notes, books, catalog) stored under the installed skill-local _data/ directory. Note: project_root defaults to the installed Tapestry skill root and can be overridden explicitly.

fonts.description: Font configuration for knowledge base display. en_font: English UI font, zh_font: Chinese UI font

language.description: Language handling configuration. auto_detect: automatically detect content language, default_language: fallback language, preserve_original: keep content in original language instead of translating
